en.btn_popup_single_auto: Popup Form Single + Auto Hide Keyboard
en.btn_card_fixed: Card Fixed Height + One Screen + Fixed Keyboard
en.btn_card_scroll: Card Auto Height + Scroll + Fixed Keyboard
en.vibrate_short_desc: vibrateShort triggers a short vibration (30ms). Supported on iPhone 7/7 Plus and above and Android.
en.vibrate_peek_continuous_desc: Three consecutive Peek haptics, iOS only.
en.vibrate_notification_desc: Notification haptic for success, warning, error, iOS only.
en.vibrate_selection_desc: Selection haptic for selection scenarios, iOS only.

zh.btn_form_single_auto: 浏览/轻量输入框表单型+键盘自动收起
zh.btn_form_multi_fixed: 多输入框表单型+键盘固定
zh.btn_popup_single_auto: 弹框轻量输入框表单型+键盘自动收起
zh.btn_popup_multi_fixed: 弹窗多输入框表单型+键盘固定
zh.btn_card_fixed: 卡片高度固定+一屏固定+键盘固定
zh.btn_card_scroll: 卡片高度自适应+超出一屏滚动+键盘固定
zh.vibrate_short_desc: vibrateShort 使手机发生较短时间的振动（30 ms）。仅在 iPhone 7 / 7 Plus 以上及 Android 机型生效
zh.vibrate_long_desc: vibrateLong 使手机发生较长时间的振动（400 ms）
zh.vibrate_peek_desc: Peek 触感振动，仅 iOS 支持
zh.vibrate_pop_desc: Pop 触感振动，仅 iOS 支持
zh.vibrate_peek_continuous_desc: peekVibrateContinuous 连续 3 次 Peek 触感振动，仅 iOS 支持
zh.vibrate_notification_desc: notification 触感振动，常用于成功、警告、失败等场景，仅 iOS 支持
zh.vibrate_selection_desc: selection 触感振动，常用于选择场景，仅 iOS 支持
